data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Missions will be doubled.
Don't miss out this chance to develop your students!

Mission Normal*2: 10/24(Mon) 19:00 – 10/28 (Fri) 18:59 (UTC)
Mission Hard*2: 10/28(Fri) 19:00 – 10/31 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
